en_title: '#CFBPlayDontPay' – EA Sports College Football 27 Stumbles With Mostly Negative Reviews as Fans Fight Back Against Microtransactions
cn_title: 《EA Sports College Football 27》因离线模式微交易遭玩家抵制
subtitle: 离线也要付费
opus_summary: 《EA Sports College Football 27》因以微交易替代离线模式XP增益设置，Steam评价跌至「多半差评」。玩家发起#CFBPlayDontPay运动，EA承诺加入新XP选项。

paragraphs.en: EA Sports College Football 27 has launched to "Mostly Negative" Steam reviews as fans revolt against pricey microtransactions in offline game modes.
paragraphs.cn: 《EA Sports College Football 27》发售后Steam评价为「多半差评」，粉丝正因离线模式中的高价微交易而展开反抗。

paragraphs.en: The latest in EA's line of College Football video games immediately came under fire when it launched for early access on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S July 6. It all stems from the removal of features for the Road to Glory and Dynasty modes in favor of microtransactions that range from $9.99 to $149.99.
paragraphs.cn: EA旗下《College Football》系列最新作于7月6日在PC、PS5和XBOX Series开启抢先体验后，立即遭到抨击。争议源于《Road to Glory》和《Dynasty》模式的功能被移除，取而代之的是价格9.99至149.99美元(约合人民币68至1017元)的微交易。

paragraphs.en: In College Football 25 and 26, offline versions of these modes allowed players to customize their experience by using settings to boost XP gain. In College Football 27, EA has gutted those settings, replacing them with the option to spend real-world money to increase things like a player's coach level.
paragraphs.cn: 在《College Football 25》和《College Football 26》中，这些模式的离线版本允许玩家通过设置提高XP获取量，自定义体验。而在《College Football 27》中，EA砍掉了这些设置，改为让玩家花真钱提升教练等级等内容。

paragraphs.en: As outlined by content creator Bordeaux, who has helped push the #CFBPlayDontPay movement, this year's College Football entry asks players to spend as much as $100 to reach the max coach level of 100. The fact that these options were added without much of a heads-up, with some content creators alleging that microtransactions were not mentioned in pre-launch builds, has only made matters worse.
paragraphs.cn: 正如推动#CFBPlayDontPay运动的内容创作者Bordeaux所说，今年的《College Football》要求玩家最多花费100美元(约合人民币678元)，才能达到100级教练等级。这些选项在没有充分预告的情况下加入，且一些内容创作者称发售前版本没有提到微交易，让事态进一步恶化。

paragraphs.en: "It makes me sick that you spent years building up community trust, saying that this was our game, this is all for us," Bordeaux said. "Nobody, not a single person out there was like, 'What would make our game better? What would make me want to play College Football more? Oh, I know. Being able to buy coach levels. Being able to buy upgrades for my player that is now way too slow to upgrade.'"
paragraphs.cn: Bordeaux说：「你们花了多年建立社区信任，说这是我们的游戏、这是为我们所有人打造的游戏；如今的做法让我恶心。没有任何人会说：‘什么能让我们的游戏更好？什么能让我更想玩《College Football》？我知道了，可以购买教练等级，可以购买升级我那个如今升级速度慢得离谱的球员的道具。’」

paragraphs.en: As controversy strikes, players have gone to the one place that : the Steam reviews section. Online conversation surrounding College Football 27 since launch has been consumed by this community campaign as it seeks to push EA to walk back microtransactions and bring back those in-game XP modifiers. Now, just 22% of the reviews for College Football 27 are positive, earning it that auburn Mostly Negative marker.
paragraphs.cn: 争议爆发后，玩家前往了唯一能表达意见的地方：Steam评价区。《College Football 27》发售后的网络讨论几乎都被这场社区运动占据，玩家试图推动EA撤回微交易并恢复游戏内XP调整器。如今，《College Football 27》的好评率只有22%，因此获得了醒目的「多半差评」标记。

paragraphs.en: Not only is almost every creator speaking out, but so is your entire community
paragraphs.cn: 几乎每位创作者都在发声，整个社区也一样。

paragraphs.en: I’m extremely proud with how everybody has come together #CFBPlayDontPay pic.twitter.com/pJvhHsuRuB
paragraphs.cn: 我为大家团结起来的样子感到无比自豪。#CFBPlayDontPay

paragraphs.en: Dusted off an old friend today. How far we’ve come yet how far we have fallen #CFBPlayDontPay pic.twitter.com/WBEqBofk1u
paragraphs.cn: 今天重新找回了一位老朋友。我们走了多远，又跌落了多远。#CFBPlayDontPay

paragraphs.en: "#CFBPlayDontPay," one review . "Adding microtransactions to offline Road to Glory & offline Dynasty modes is insane. I will never spend another dime on any future CFB games if this is not reverted. Happy this one came to PC but this will be the last. Thanks EA for ruining what another game franchise! Greedy mfs."
paragraphs.cn: 一条评价写道：「#CFBPlayDontPay。给离线《Road to Glory》和离线《Dynasty》模式加入微交易太疯狂了。如果不撤回，我再也不会为未来的CFB游戏花一分钱。很高兴这作登陆PC，但这会是最后一作。谢谢EA毁掉又一个游戏系列！贪婪的混蛋。」

paragraphs.en: Steam user agreed with Bordeaux – in terms of raw gameplay, the 2027 College Football entry is exceptionally well-made. That didn't stop them from leaving a negative review.
paragraphs.cn: 一名Steam用户赞同Bordeaux的看法：单论实际玩法，2027年的《College Football》制作得极其出色。但这仍没有阻止他留下差评。

paragraphs.en: "However, due to EA having biblical levels of greed and their response to all the backlash introducing microtransactions to offline game modes I will not be recommending this to anyone," they explained. "EA needs to be stripped of their exclusive rights to produce these games and let it fall into the hands of another publisher that won’t **** its casual player base over. They’ve been doing this microtransaction BS for YEARS on Madden and now they’re starting with CFB. It’s unacceptable. If you haven’t already bought the game don’t buy it now."
paragraphs.cn: 他解释道：「然而，EA有着圣经级别的贪婪，面对所有反弹还把微交易引入离线模式，所以我不会向任何人推荐这款游戏。EA应该被剥夺制作这些游戏的独家权利，让另一家不会坑害休闲玩家的发行商接手。他们在《Madden》里搞这种微交易鬼把戏已经很多年，现在又开始对《CFB》下手。不可接受。如果你还没买这款游戏，现在别买。」

paragraphs.en: EA did eventually respond to the backlash, saying an upcoming patch would include new XP settings in Road to Glory and Dynasty. For the latter, players can expect new options that allow for up to 1.5x XP, while experience earned in the latter will be tied to the difficulty levels. What might seem to a walking back has done little to quell concerns.
paragraphs.cn: EA最终回应了反弹，表示即将推出的补丁会为《Road to Glory》和《Dynasty》加入新的XP设置。后者将提供最高1.5倍XP的新选项，而获得的经验值会与难度等级挂钩。这看似是一次让步，却几乎没有平息担忧。

paragraphs.en: imagine being 8 years old and loading up College Football 27 to play out a career in Road to Glory
paragraphs.cn: 想象一下，你8岁时打开《College Football 27》，在《Road to Glory》中体验职业生涯。

paragraphs.en: you put in on Freshman difficulty, because you are EIGHT, and you are punished with less XP gains than people who play on Heisman
paragraphs.cn: 你选择新手难度，因为你才八岁，却因此获得比在Heisman难度游玩的人更少的XP。

paragraphs.en: Now you hate College Football games for the rest… https://t.co/jNTsYpYyWO pic.twitter.com/U6iD9M2qKB
paragraphs.cn: 从此以后，你都会讨厌《College Football》游戏……

paragraphs.en: Can’t wait to spent $80 to buy a non-physical copy of a game I don’t actually own so I can boot it up and be heavily incentivized to pay more money if I want to experience key features like leveling up my player.
paragraphs.cn: 迫不及待花80美元(约合人民币542元)买一份并不真正属于我的非实体游戏，然后打开它；如果想体验升级球员等关键功能，还会被强烈鼓励继续花钱。

paragraphs.en: The future of gaming looks bright! #cfbplaydontpay https://t.co/6qndFp9c15
paragraphs.cn: 游戏的未来一片光明！#cfbplaydontpay

paragraphs.en: Those new XP options seem to be slower than what was previously available, and some choice wording makes it clear that players will be discouraged from trying out easier difficulties. Bordeaux and the countless fans supporting #CFBPlayDontPay said they aren't backing down, with many hoping EA opts to remove microtransactions entirely.
paragraphs.cn: 那些新的XP选项似乎比此前的设置更慢，一些措辞也明确表明，玩家会被劝阻尝试更低难度。Bordeaux和无数支持#CFBPlayDontPay的粉丝表示不会退让，许多人希望EA彻底移除微交易。

paragraphs.en: "This is the phrasing that just sets me off," the content creator said regarding EA's confirmation that disabling player Wear & Tear would affect XP gain. "This is an offline – an offline Road to Glory mode – why the f**k are we worried about offsetting the gameplay advantage? Read between the lines. We all know what the actual reason is. We know where this is headed in the future if things don't change, if things are not reverted."
paragraphs.cn: 关于EA确认关闭球员「损耗」会影响XP获取，内容创作者说：「这种措辞真的让我火大。这是离线的——离线《Road to Glory》模式——为什么我们要担心抵消玩法优势？读懂弦外之音吧。我们都知道真正原因是什么。如果事情不改变、不撤回，我们也知道未来会走向哪里。」

paragraphs.en: As negative reviews pour in and accusations of pay-to-win microtransactions in single-player modes mount, it's unclear if EA has any plan to walk back its strategy in a way that will make players happy. For now, many are asking disgruntled fans to be thoughtful about where they direct their calls for change.
paragraphs.cn: 随着差评不断涌入，单人模式中存在付费获胜微交易的指控越来越多，目前不清楚EA是否计划以让玩家满意的方式撤回策略。眼下，许多人呼吁不满的粉丝谨慎选择呼吁改变的对象。

paragraphs.en: "Devs did good but removing a feature and making people pay to replicate it in an OFFLINE mode is the most awful, EA thing to do to this game," another Steam review . "#CFBPlayNotPay"
paragraphs.cn: 另一条Steam评价写道：「开发者做得不错，但移除功能、再让玩家付费在离线模式中复现它，是EA对这款游戏做过的最糟糕的事。#CFBPlayNotPay」

paragraphs.en: The thing that @EASPORTSCollege doesn't understand about Dynasty and Road to Glory #CFBPlayDontPay pic.twitter.com/qIjEPVr4E7
paragraphs.cn: @EASPORTSCollege不明白《Dynasty》和《Road to Glory》的问题。#CFBPlayDontPay

paragraphs.en: I am a CUT player but i stand with my dynasty and road to glory brothers! I am not buying another pack until microtransactions are removed or the XP sliders are added back into Dynasty/RTG #CFBPLAYDONTPAY
paragraphs.cn: 我是CUT玩家，但我支持《Dynasty》和《Road to Glory》的兄弟们！在移除微交易或把XP滑块加回Dynasty/RTG之前，我不会再买任何礼包。#CFBPLAYDONTPAY

paragraphs.en: "Before I continue to rip into EA, I'm ripping into the higher-ups, here," Bordeaux said in his initial video. "I'm not ripping into the devs. It is not the devs' fault. It's not their decisions that are leading to these microtransactions. It's someone higher up that is saying, 'We need to make more money. Let's get more revenue out of this. Maybe Ultimate Team in CUT (College Ultimate Team) isn't cutting it because no one cares about College Ultimate Team.'
paragraphs.cn: Bordeaux在最初的视频中说：「在继续批评EA之前，我要先批评上层管理者。我不是在批评开发者。这不是开发者的错，也不是他们的决定导致了这些微交易。是更高层的人在说：‘我们需要赚更多钱，从这里获得更多收入。也许CUT（College Ultimate Team）里的Ultimate Team不够赚钱，因为没人关心College Ultimate Team。’」

paragraphs.en: "But I'm not blaming the devs. The devs did an amazing job, and that is the part that sucks to me the most. This is the best game they have put out. It's not even close. There is the least amount of bugs – there's still a couple huge ones, and I am sure they'll get to it – but the devs cooked. The devs did a good job, and it is all going to be overshadowed because of this microtransaction slop that they've put in."
paragraphs.cn: 「但我不怪开发者。开发者做得惊人，这恰恰是最让我难受的地方。这是他们推出过的最佳游戏，完全没有之一。游戏Bug最少——当然仍有几个很严重，我相信他们会处理——但开发者真的做出了好东西。开发者做得很好，可这一切都将被他们加入的微交易垃圾掩盖。」

paragraphs.en: IGN gave EA Sports College Football 27 a 7/10 review . We said, "This season ain’t gonna knock anybody’s socks off, and both Dynasty and Road to Glory have leaned hard into spreadsheet management this year, but smart on-field additions to an already good game make College Football 27 worth suiting up for once again."
paragraphs.cn: IGN为《EA Sports College Football 27》打出7/10分。我们写道：「本赛季不会让任何人惊掉下巴，《Dynasty》和《Road to Glory》今年都重度转向表格管理，但在一款本就不错的游戏上加入聪明的场上内容，仍让《College Football 27》值得再次穿上球衣。」
